rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));
fill: light-dark(rgb(204, 229, 255), rgb(24, 46, 68)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));
